title: Electrical Engineer - Marine
description:
Job Description

  • Provide on-site technical support for the installation, servicing, and repair of Krimpen and Arco control systems, including related mechanical tasks within area of expertise.
  • Perform work on PLCs, electric drive systems, and ZF control systems; inspect wiring installations and supervise shipyard and crew activities to ensure compliance with drawings, quality, and contract specifications.
  • Attend meetings at shipyards or onboard vessels with ship owners, crew, consultants, suppliers, technical superintendents, and yard managers to discuss outstanding and upcoming tasks.
  • Support the Service Manager/Coordinator by providing technical assistance through the helpdesk.
  • Monitor project progress to ensure timely completion and adherence to ZF quality standards; manage cost, schedule, and technical aspects, and submit clear, acknowledged service reports upon completion.
  • Develop technical solutions and manage subcontractors, ensuring compliance with technical specifications and safety standards.
  • Liaise with subcontractors and stakeholders at all levels while collaborating within a regional matrix structure to support ZF Marine’s business growth.

Job Requirements

  • Minimum Nitec or Diploma in Electrical (Mechatronics) Engineering.
  • Traveling to local sites and overseas (on-site projects, regional assignment and manufacturing facilities) is required.
  • Relevant work experience in a similar field is preferred.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and general computer literacy.
  • Independent, proactive, and resourceful with a positive attitude; thrives under pressure and collaborates effectively as a strong team player with solid communication skills.
  • Language proficiency: English (spoken, written, and read) is preferred. Proficiency in a second language, mother tongue, or local dialect is an added advantage.
  • Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.

postedCompany.description: As a business unit of ZF Friedrichshafen AG, with headquarters in Germany, we offer our business partners an extensive product and service range of drive train and chassis technology in original equipment manufacturing (OEM) quality. Currently, we are seeking suitably qualified individual to join our regional headquarters in Singapore to prepare for the challenges of the future.
postedCompany.name: ZF ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
